goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'polish' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'gastropub' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'arrive by 17:15'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve polish food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves gastropub food
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should arrive by 17:15
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
